'''chomapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:doctorless|doctorless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doctorless|doctorless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chomapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomapithi|chomapithi]] || [[word:chomapiji|chomapiji]] || [[word:chomapishi|chomapishi]] || [[word:chomapiki|chomapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomaputhuthu|chomaputhuthu]] || [[word:chomapujuju|chomapujuju]] || [[word:chomapushushu|chomapushushu]] || [[word:chomapukuku|chomapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomaputhu|chomaputhu]] || [[word:chomapuju|chomapuju]] || [[word:chomapushu|chomapushu]] || [[word:chomapuku|chomapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomapufthuf|chomapufthuf]] || [[word:chomapufjuf|chomapufjuf]] || [[word:chomapufshuf|chomapufshuf]] || [[word:chomapufkuf|chomapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomapethe|chomapethe]] || [[word:chomapeje|chomapeje]] || [[word:chomapeshe|chomapeshe]] || [[word:chomapeke|chomapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomapothotho|chomapothotho]] || [[word:chomapojojo|chomapojojo]] || [[word:chomaposhosho|chomaposhosho]] || [[word:chomapokoko|chomapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomapotho|chomapotho]] || [[word:chomapojo|chomapojo]] || [[word:chomaposho|chomaposho]] || [[word:chomapoko|chomapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomapofthof|chomapofthof]] || [[word:chomapofjof|chomapofjof]] || [[word:chomapofshof|chomapofshof]] || [[word:chomapofkof|chomapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomapïfthïf|chomapïfthïf]] || [[word:chomapïfjïf|chomapïfjïf]] || [[word:chomapïfshïf|chomapïfshïf]] || [[word:chomapïfkïf|chomapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomapïfthïfthïf|chomapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chomapïfjïfjïf|chomapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chomapïfshïfshïf|chomapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chomapïfkïfkïf|chomapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomapïfthïf|chomapïfthïf]] || [[word:chomapïfjïf|chomapïfjïf]] || [[word:chomapïfshïf|chomapïfshïf]] || [[word:chomapïfkïf|chomapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomapïfthïf|chomapïfthïf]] || [[word:chomapïfjïf|chomapïfjïf]] || [[word:chomapïfshïf|chomapïfshïf]] || [[word:chomapïfkïf|chomapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomapæthæ|chomapæthæ]] || [[word:chomapæjæ|chomapæjæ]] || [[word:chomapæshæ|chomapæshæ]] || [[word:chomapækæ|chomapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomapathatha|chomapathatha]] || [[word:chomapajaja|chomapajaja]] || [[word:chomapashasha|chomapashasha]] || [[word:chomapakaka|chomapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomapatha|chomapatha]] || [[word:chomapaja|chomapaja]] || [[word:chomapasha|chomapasha]] || [[word:chomapaka|chomapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomapafthaf|chomapafthaf]] || [[word:chomapafjaf|chomapafjaf]] || [[word:chomapafshaf|chomapafshaf]] || [[word:chomapafkaf|chomapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chomapasha|chomapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomapshësha|chomapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomaprosha|chomaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomapmusha|chomapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomapyasha|chomapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomapnkshësha|gochomapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomapnkrosha|gochomapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomapnkmusha|gochomapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomapnkyasha|gochomapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chomamapasha|chomamapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomamapshësha|chomamapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomamaprosha|chomamaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomamapmusha|chomamapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomamapyasha|chomamapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomamapnkshësha|gochomamapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomamapnkrosha|gochomamapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomamapnkmusha|gochomamapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomamapnkyasha|gochomamapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chemæpasha|chemæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chemæpshësha|chemæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chemæprosha|chemæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chemæpmusha|chemæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chemæpyasha|chemæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochemæpnkshësha|gochemæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochemæpnkrosha|gochemæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochemæpnkmusha|gochemæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochemæpnkyasha|gochemæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chomfapasha|chomfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomfapshësha|chomfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomfaprosha|chomfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomfapmusha|chomfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomfapyasha|chomfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomfapnkshësha|gochomfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomfapnkrosha|gochomfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomfapnkmusha|gochomfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomfapnkyasha|gochomfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
